text: I feel a sense of curiosity and intrigue as I wander through this modern space. The glass-walled room where people are gathered suggests a meeting of minds or perhaps a lecture, while the colorful, bold R+D display outside speaks of innovation and progress. I feel both the energy of collaborative thought and the invitation to ponder the relationship between humans and intelligent machines. There is a slight sense of displacement, as if I am both observer and participant, wondering where I fit in this ongoing experiment of inquiry and development.
